punctuation_style: Generally uses correct punctuation, but sometimes omits commas. Frequently uses exclamation points with approvals. Includes inconsistent spacing around punctuation marks.
notes: Often asks about the creator's warm-up progress. Frequently sends the same block of text with links and instructions. Uses 'please' frequently when making requests. Frequently approves drafts with 'Draft approved! ✅'
